arts.ttl: Munoz gives Palace lead against Doncaster
arts.sum: Daniel Munoz gives Crystal Palace a first-half lead against League Two Doncaster Rovers in the fourth round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Gallery: Palace taking on Doncaster in FA Cup
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are battling drizzly conditions and a fervent home support at the Eco-Power Stadium, seeking to progress past Doncaster Rovers in the FA Cup – enjoy the best photos as they happen below!

arts.ttl: Doncaster Rovers v Crystal Palace: FA Cup fourth round – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 7.45pm GMT kick-off Fifth-round draw: Plymouth go to Man City Get in touch! You can email John here 1 min: The Palace fans have travelled up the M1 and M18 in numbers. It looks freezing cold. Doncaster engage the old high press and forced Matt Turner to lose the ball. Oliver Glasner’s turtle-neck jumper rather unfortunately reminds of the U-Boat captain in Dad’s Army. Don’t tell him, Pike. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Palace to face Millwall in potential fifth-round FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Crystal Palace will take on Millwall at Selhurst Park in the Emirates FA Cup fifth-round – should the Eagles make it past Doncaster Rovers in the fourth on Monday evening.

arts.ttl: Team News: Three changes for Palace at Doncaster as Wharton returns
arts.sum: Manager Oliver Glasner has made three changes for Crystal Palace's FA Cup tie away at Doncaster Rovers, with Adam Wharton returning to the starting line-up – and Ben Chilwell on the bench.

arts.ttl: FA Cup draw LIVE! Manchester United, Man City, Crystal Palace and Fulham learn fifth round fate
arts.sum: Big names have already been knocked out of competition with Wembley in sight

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid transfer news: Crystal Palace star identified as potential Antoine Griezmann replacement?
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid are reportedly contemplating whether to make an approach for one of Crystal Palace's star men during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: FA Cup fifth-round draw LIVE: Man Utd, Newcastle, City, Aston Villa and Plymouth in hat for last 16
arts.sum: After some shock exits and giant-killings in the fourth round, 16 teams remain in the FA Cup

arts.ttl: LIVE today on Palace TV+: Watch our Under-21s in action (14:30)
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-21s could jump as high as four places in the Premier League 2 table this afternoon (14:30 GMT kick-off), when they travel to Stoke City Under-21s – LIVE on Palace TV+!

arts.ttl: €28m January offer from Crystal Palace revealed – Eagles shocked over rejection
arts.sum: Crystal Palace were fairly active in the winter transfer window. Ben Chilwell arrived from Chelsea and Romain Esse arrived from Millwall. Whether the Eagles have seriously improved their side or not remains to be seen but it seems as if they made a move to sign another player late in the window. Calciomercato’s Daniele Longo The post €28m January offer from Crystal Palace revealed – Eagles shocked over rejection appeared first on Sport Witness.
